data.body: STORY 8d91 progress: grandfathering regression test written (tests/unit/test_identity_enforce_since_grandfather.py, 3 tests, covers config/env boundary path + mixed-store per-event grandfathered flags + strict-ancestor 'boundary commit itself enforced' semantics). Confirmed GREEN against existing logic + teeth (mutating _is_enforced to grandfather the boundary commit -> strict-ancestor test goes RED, reverted). lint+typecheck pass. Committed 084ae1653 (rebar-ticket 8d91 + DCO + Change-Id) and PUSHED to Gerrit change 741 (https://rebar.solutions.navateam.com/c/rebar/+/741). Awaiting Verified+1 / LLM-Review+1. This push also drives the review-bot's relates_to LINK on 8d91 = 1a51 canary confirmation. Anchor decision deferred until 4dc0 (CI) + 1a51 (Gerrit LINK) signing confirmed.
